steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Python to compute indicator values for Eneva as of 2024-12-31 using provided data
price = 12.47
# Shares
TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED = 1932592000
TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY = 1202000
TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING = TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED - TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY
print('Total shares outstanding:', TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
# Balance sheet (from data)
ATIVO_TOTAL = 52770780000.0
DISPONIBILIDADES = 3194255000.0 + 672057000.0  # Caixa + Aplicações Financeiras
ATIVO_CIRCULANTE = 8518296000.0
DIV_BRUTA = 1369143000.0 + 16017296000.0 + 8422755000.0
DIV_LIQUIDA = DIV_BRUTA - DISPONIBILIDADES
PAT_LIQ_CONSOL = 20214767000.0
RECEITA_LIQ_12M = 11387505000.0  # Receita líquida (assumed equal à Receita de Vendas líquida)
# EBIT (12m)
EBIT_12M = 2211909000.0
LUCRO_LIQ_12M = 549472000.0
# Gross margin variables
RECEITA_BRUTA = 3953483000.0
GROSS_MARGIN = (RECEITA_BRUTA) / (RECEITA_LIQ_12M)
# But Gross margin should be Gross Profit/Net Revenue; Use 3.953... / 11.387...
GROSS_MARGIN = 3953483000.0 / 11387505000.0
MARG_BRUTA = GROSS_MARGIN*100
MARG_EBIT = (EBIT_12M / RECEITA_LIQ_12M)*100
MARG_LIQ = (LUCRO_LIQ_12M / RECEITA_LIQ_12M)*100
# EBIT / Ativo
EBIT_DIV_ATIVO = EBIT_12M / ATIVO_TOTAL
Giro_Ativos = RECEITA_LIQ_12M / ATIVO_TOTAL
# ROIC: EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
FORNECEDORES = 1660039000.0
CAIXA = 3194255000.0
ROIC = EBIT_12M / (ATIVO_TOTAL - FORNECEDORES - CAIXA)
# ROE: Net income / Equity
ROE = LUCRO_LIQ_12M / PAT_LIQ_CONSOL
# Liquidity ratio: Net working capital / current liabilities
PASSIVO_CIRCULANTE = 5783912000.0
ATIVO_CIRCULANTE_LIQ = ATIVO_CIRCULANTE - PASSIVO_CIRCULANTE
LIQUIDEZ_CORR = ATIVO_CIRCULANTE_LIQ / PASSIVO_CIRCULANTE
# Div Br / Patrim
DIV_BR_PATRIM = DIV_BRUTA / PAT_LIQ_CONSOL
# P/... per-share metrics
P_L = price / (LUCRO_LIQ_12M / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)  # P/E per share using annual net income
P_VP = price / (PAT_LIQ_CONSOL / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
P_EBIT = price / (EBIT_12M / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
PSR = price / (RECEITA_LIQ_12M / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
P_ATIVOS = price / ((ATIVO_TOTAL) / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
# P/Cap.Giro: price / (trabalho de giro: ativo circulante líquido)
CAP_GIRO = (ATIVO_CIRCULANTE_LIQ) / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
P_CAP_GIRO = price / CAP_GIRO
P_ATIV_CIRC_LIQ = price / (ATIVO_CIRCULANTE_LIQ / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING)
# EV / EBITDA and EV / EBIT
MARKET_CAP = price * TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
NET_DEBT = DIV_LIQUIDA
EV = MARKET_CAP + NET_DEBT
EBITDA = EBIT_12M + 0  # assume no depreciation? No, we need add back depreciation: use 7.04 Depreciation amount from dataset for 2024-12-31
DEPR_AMOR = 1689626000.0
EBITDA_VAL = EBIT_12M + DEPR_AMOR
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA_VAL
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT_12M
# LPA and VPA
LPA = LUCRO_LIQ_12M / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
VPA = PAT_LIQ_CONSOL / TOTAL_SHARES_OUTSTANDING
print('P_L (approx):', P_L)
print('P_VP:', P_VP)
print('P_EBIT:', P_EBIT)
print('PSR:', PSR)
print('P_ATIVOS:', P_ATIVOS)
print('P_CAP_GIRO:', P_CAP_GIRO)
print('P_ATIV_CIRC_LIQ:', P_ATIV_CIRC_LIQ)
print('EV/ EBITDA:', EV_EBITDA)
print('EV/ EBIT:', EV_EBIT)
print('LPA', LPA)
print('VPA', VPA)
print('MargBruta %:', MARG_BRUTA if 'MARG_BRUTA' in locals() else 0)
print('Marg EBIT %', MARG_EBIT)
print('Marg Liquida %', MARG_LIQ)
print('EBIT / Ativo', EBIT_DIV_ATIVO)
print('ROIC', ROIC)
print('ROE', ROE)
print('Liquidez Corr', LIQUIDEZ_CORR)
print('Div Br/ Patrim', DIV_BR_PATRIM)
print('Giro Ativos', Giro_Ativos)
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
